meta.description: 5-phase evasion: (1) head-on approach to Wall A → (2) lateral snap +Y past Wall A → (3) S-curve corridor between Wall B (+Y) and Wall C (-Y) → (4) snap-stop before Wall D → (5) return glide home with residual field interaction. Fault injections: stuck flap #7 at t=7-8.4s, dead fan group 2 at t=12-13.6s.

phases.label: Head-on approach
phases.description: Cruise toward Wall A at 2.5-3 m/s, repulsion field begins at ~12 m clearance

phases.label: Lateral snap past Wall A
phases.description: Repulsion deflects craft +Y; diagonal glide clears Wall A with 8 m margin

phases.label: S-curve corridor
phases.description: Threading between Wall B (+Y) and Wall C (-Y) — simultaneous opposing repulsion fields

phases.label: Snap-stop before Wall D
phases.description: Full deceleration and reversal before Wall D; stuck-flap fault active during approach

phases.label: Return glide
phases.description: Return home; dead-fan-group fault injected mid-return to test fault-tolerant allocator
